title: Unnai Partha Pinbu Naan Lyrics Kadhal Mannan
stanzas: <div>Unnai Partha Pinbu Naan Song Lyrics Kadhal Mannan

Unnai paartha pinbu naan
naanaaga illaiye
en ninaivu therinthu naan
idhupola illaiye

ivale ivale endru
idhayam thelindhen
ilamai ilamai paadhithen

kollai konda andha nilaa
enai kondru kondru
thindrathe

Yen pirandhen endru
nana irundhen
unnai paartha vudan
unmai naan arindhen

ennuyiril nee paadhi endru
un kanmaniyil naan
kandu kondaen.

nee varuvaayo
illai maraivaayo
ye ye ye yen

nee neruppu endru
therindha pinnum
unai thoda thunindhen
enna thunichaladi

manamagalaai unnai
paartha pinnum
unnai sirai edukka
manam thudikkuthadi

nee varuvaayo
illai maraivaayo
ye ye ye yen

Unnai paartha pinbu naan
naanaaga illaiye
en ninaivu therinthu naan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, reflecting on the emotions that arise when one thinks of their beloved.

In which movie is this song featured?

Unnai Partha Pinbu Naan is featured in the movie Kadhal Mannan.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary S.P. Balasubramaniam.

When was this song released?

This song was released on March 6, 1998.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Unnai Partha Pinbu Naan, the protagonist reflects on the profound impact of love and the memories associated with it. The song beautifully conveys the emotions of nostalgia and longing, making it a perfect fit for romantic moments. Its heartfelt lyrics and soothing melody evoke a sense of melancholy, resonating with anyone who has loved deeply. This classic piece from Kadhal Mannan remains a cherished favorite among Tamil music lovers.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unnai Partha Pinbu Naan from the movie Kadhal Mannan is a timeless romantic melody that captures the essence of longing and love. With the soulful voice of S.P. Balasubramaniam, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet pangs of affection. Its poignant lyrics and soothing tune make it a must-listen for fans of classic Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: After seeing you, I am not myself anymore; my memories are not like this.
I have been thinking about how much, how much time has passed, both day and night.
I have understood my heart saying 'this is her', I have read the youth, the youth.
That moon which took me away has been consuming me slowly.
That sweet pain still needs more, more of it..
After seeing you, I am not myself anymore.
After seeing you, I am not myself anymore.
I was thinking I was born for you; when I saw you, I realized the truth.
You are half of me, I found you in my heart.
I have crossed so many girls, yet my heart has not thudded like this.
Stealing two moments of happiness to say it is not fair.
Will you come or will you disappear, oh oh oh why?
Will you give yourself or will you hide away..
After seeing you, I am not myself anymore.
Even after knowing you are fire, I still touch you; what is this madness?
After seeing you, my heart starts to beat to take you away.
I think of you in the past, I cannot forget you.
Even after knowing you are a flower, the desire for the bee does not end.
Will you come or will you disappear, oh oh oh why?
Will you give yourself or will you hide away..
After seeing you, I am not myself anymore; my memories are not like this.
I have been thinking about how much, how much time has passed, both day and night.
I have understood my heart saying 'this is her', I have read the youth, the youth.
That moon which took me away has been consuming me slowly.
That sweet pain still needs more, more of it..
After seeing you, I am not myself anymore.
